# Prairie Digital - Full Reference

Prairie Digital LLC is a digital employee company headquartered in Springfield, Illinois. Founded in 2026, the company deploys custom-built digital employees into small and medium-sized businesses, primarily serving the Midwest United States.

## Problem We Solve
Small business owners spend 3-4 hours daily on administrative work: emails, scheduling, follow-ups, data entry, and coordination. Hiring is expensive ($2,000-3,500/month for a part-time admin), slow, and unreliable. Good help is hard to find, especially in smaller markets. Off-the-shelf software requires technical knowledge most small business owners don't have.

## Our Solution
Prairie Digital provides digital employees as a managed service. The client experience is identical to hiring a remote employee: they communicate via email or text, assign work, and receive results. The digital employee handles operations management, client relationships, business development, administrative tasks, financial operations, and custom process automation.

The key difference from software platforms: Prairie Digital handles all setup, configuration, monitoring, and improvement. The client never interacts with a dashboard or configures a tool. They just have a reliable team member.

## Services Offered
1. Operations Management: daily operations, team coordination, deadline tracking, workflow management
2. Client Relationship Management: client communication, follow-ups, relationship building, retention at scale
3. Business Development: pipeline management, prospect nurturing, proposal preparation, revenue operations
4. Administrative Operations: back-office work, document management, vendor coordination, compliance tracking
5. Financial Operations: invoicing, expense tracking, payment follow-ups, financial reporting
6. Process Automation: custom multi-step workflow automation tailored to unique business processes

## Industries Served
Automotive dealerships, real estate (sales and appraisal), plumbing and HVAC, general contractors, professional services, law firms, medical clinics, boutique retail, creative agencies, home services

## Onboarding Process
Phase 1 - Discovery: Single 60-90 minute conversation to learn the business
Phase 2 - Build: 3-7 days internal build, testing, and QA (client not involved)
Phase 3 - Introduction: 30 minute handoff, digital employee goes live
Phase 4 - Monitoring: Ongoing invisible management, improvement, and support

## Pricing Model
Flat monthly fee ranging from $500 to $2,500 depending on scope. One-time setup fee of $500-$1,000. Priced against headcount replacement, not software licensing.

## Competitive Positioning
Prairie Digital competes with: offshore virtual assistants, local administrative hires, self-serve platforms (Vendasta, Lindy.AI, Motion), and doing nothing. The company differentiates through its managed service model, zero-learning-curve client experience, and deep customization per business.
